eidolons.name: Lone Star
eidolons.description: When battle starts, Acheron gains 1 point of Slashed Dream. When Acheron's Slashed Dream is at maximum, her CRIT Rate increases by 15%.

eidolons.name: Mara
eidolons.description: When an ally uses an ability that inflicts debuff on an enemy, Acheron gains 1 additional point of Slashed Dream. This effect can only trigger 1 time per turn.

eidolons.name: Red Banner
eidolons.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15. Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Crimson Plum
eidolons.description: When Acheron uses Ultimate, her ATK increases by 50% for 2 turns.

eidolons.name: Violet Spark
eidolons.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15. Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Final Dream
eidolons.description: When Acheron uses Ultimate, she ignores 20% of enemy DEF. Additionally, each hit of Ultimate has a 50% fixed chance to remove 1 Crimson Knot from the enemy.
